rows.label: tev024801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Camilla about the infrastructure in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Camilla about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Camilla about the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Camilla about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0001
rows.name:
My favorite part of NLA has got
to be the residential district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0002
rows.name:
It has the park, the sports complex, and the
cathedral. All the facilities that make it possible
to live an Earth-like lifestyle here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Whenever I'm making a delivery to
or through that district, I'm always
struck by nostalgia for Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0004
rows.name:
They still haven't finished the direct road from
the commercial district to the administrative
district, so I have to detour through there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0005
rows.name:
But I don't mind the walk—it always
makes me feel better when I'm in a
bad mood. You should try it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0008
rows.name:
Welcome to Army Pizza, where we
give you a blast of salami and
cheese straight to the gut![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0009
rows.name: We happily deliver anywhere in NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Of course, it's easy when we have so few customers.
But hopefully business will grow—my husband
Powell and I are working as hard as we can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0011
rows.name:
We'll make sure that everyone on
Mira can get that most precious
of American comfort foods—pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Let's see... I believe that customer
had the chocolate- mix pizza...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Hmm? Oh, excuse me. I had to confirm
an order, so I missed your question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0021
rows.name:
...You're asking about the Ma-non?
Well, they're certainly an interesting
people, and they sure do love pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0022
rows.name:
But their tastes can be a little...strange. For
example, they sometimes order extra toppings like
chocolate and cream on an otherwise savory pizza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0023
rows.name:
My husband, Powell, spent a lot of time
developing our menu, so it would be nice
if they ordered from it "as is."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0026
rows.name:
Let's see... Where's
my next delivery...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0027
rows.name:
Ah, sorry. I'm quite busy at the
moment, and I missed your question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Recent developments? Like
the Ma-non coming to live in
NLA? That kind of thing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Their people sure love pizza,
so business has been booming
at our Army Pizza restaurant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0030
rows.name:
These days it seems all I do is
run back and forth between their
ship and our restaurant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024801_MSG0031
rows.name: Well, I'd better get back to it![ST:wait ]
